headline: How Investors Are Reacting To CVS Health (CVS) Insulin Case Settlement Talks And Shareholder Rights Clash
summary: On April 3, 2026, CVS Health Corporation filed a definitive proxy statement urging shareholders to vote against John Chevedden’s proposal that would allow holders of 10% of shares to request a record date to initiate action by written consent, ahead of the May 14, 2026 annual meeting. This governance debate unfolds as CVS Health also works to resolve regulatory pressures, including a proposed settlement of Federal Trade Commission insulin pricing complaints that had created uncertainty for...
